message:
refactor: small optimizations across combinator, service, sync, reactor, and state

Five minor improvements that don't warrant individual commits:

1. join_all_to_result (combinator/join.rs) — The AllOk path previously
   allocated a Vec<Option<T>>, scattered results by index, then flattened.
   Since successes are emitted in source-index order (verified by
   debug_assert), replaced with a direct .into_iter().map(|(_, v)| v)
   collect, eliminating the Option wrapper and the scatter/flatten steps.

2. ConcurrencyLimit (service/concurrency_limit.rs) — Replaced
   Cx::current().expect() with a graceful None→Poll::Pending fallback.
   The expect() would panic if the service was polled outside a runtime
   context (e.g., during shutdown or in a test harness); returning Pending
   is a safer no-op.

3. OwnedAcquireFuture (sync/semaphore.rs) — Replaced if-let/else waiter
   ID lookup with map_or_else for slightly more idiomatic Rust and one
   fewer binding.

4. interest_to_poll_mode (runtime/reactor/epoll.rs) — Simplified the
   4-arm match on (bool, bool) to nested if/else.  The (false, false)
   arm was identical to (false, true), so the match was misleadingly
   suggesting four distinct behaviors when there are really three.

5. drain_ready_async_finalizers (runtime/state.rs) — Changed the region
   collection from Vec<RegionId> to SmallVec<[RegionId; 8]>, avoiding a
   heap allocation when there are 8 or fewer active regions (the common
   case for most workloads).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
